---
name: Bug report
about: Report a reproducible problem to help us improve
labels: bug
---

## Summary
A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps To Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Upload/select '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Screenshots / Logs
Add screenshots, traceback, or logs if available.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g., Windows 11]
- Python version: [e.g., 3.11]
- App version/commit: [e.g., main@abc123]

## Dataset Context (Optional)
Describe dataset size, target column type, and notable preprocessing constraints.

## Additional Context
Any other context about the problem.
